# Master Services Agreement — Northwind Logistics & Cartwright Analytics

This Master Services Agreement (the "Agreement") governs the provision of data-analytics services
between the parties identified below.

## Parties

- **Provider** — Cartwright Analytics LLC, a Delaware limited liability company.
- **Client** — Northwind Logistics Inc., a Delaware corporation.

The Provider and the Client are each a "Party" and together the "Parties".

## Definitions

- **Services** — the data-analytics and reporting work described in the Statement of Work.
- **Confidential Information** — non-public information disclosed by one Party to the other in
  connection with this Agreement.
- **Effective Date** — the date on which both Parties have signed this Agreement.

## Obligations

On and after the Effective Date, the Provider shall perform the Services with reasonable skill and
care, in accordance with the applicable data-protection requirements[^gdpr]. The Client shall pay each
undisputed invoice within thirty (30) days of receipt.

Each Party shall hold the other Party's Confidential Information in confidence and shall not disclose
it to any third party except as required by law[^ccpa]. Either Party may terminate this Agreement on
thirty (30) days' written notice; a material breach not cured within fifteen (15) days entitles the
non-breaching Party to terminate immediately.

## Liability

Neither Party's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall exceed the fees paid in the twelve (12)
months preceding the claim. Neither Party is liable for indirect or consequential loss. Nothing in
this section limits liability that cannot lawfully be excluded.

## Governing Law

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, and the Parties submit to the
exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware. The Parties'
data-protection obligations are construed consistently with the cited authorities[^gdpr][^ccpa].

## Authorities

[^gdpr]: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation), Art. 28.
[^ccpa]: California Consumer Privacy Act, Cal. Civ. Code sec. 1798.100 et seq.
